name: clinical-decision-support
description: Verifies clinical decision support recommendations based on patient history, lab results, and evidence-based guidelines.
long_description: This circuit provides cryptographic verification of clinical decision support recommendations. It takes as input patient demographic data, comorbidities, laboratory results, and medication history, and produces a verifiable proof that the recommended treatment aligns with evidence-based clinical guidelines. Suitable for supporting clinical audit trails and regulatory compliance in healthcare settings.

private.name: comorbidities
private.description: Array of ICD-10 codes for comorbid conditions

private.name: lab_results
private.description: Laboratory test results with value and unit

private.name: medication_history
private.description: Array of RxNorm codes for current and past medications

public.name: evidence_quality
public.description: Quality of evidence: high, moderate, low

regulatory_approval: FDA Software as Medical Device compliant (SaMD)
author: VRL Healthcare Working Group
security_notes: Third-party audited and FDA SaMD compliant. Designed for clinical decision support augmentation. Does not replace physician judgment. Always subject to final human clinical decision-making.
performance_notes: Constraint count: 10. Proof generation time: ~120ms. Proof size: ~2.2KB.

changelog.changes: Initial release with FDA SaMD compliance certification
